en.title: {{Python Backend Developer}}
en.text: Architecting and deploying a comprehensive Flask application with 100+ REST API endpoints for multi-cloud cost optimization across AWS, GCP, and Azure.
list: Built backend data collection pipelines processing 20–30 lakh records from multiple cloud platforms, enabling real-time inventory and cost data observability.
Designed and maintained 40+ MySQL database tables with optimized indexing and relationships, supporting scalable data storage and high-performance retrieval.
Created interactive dashboards (Power BI / Flask frontend) delivering actionable insights for cost optimization, governance, and security across cloud environments.
Implemented Redis caching layer to improve API response performance and reduce database load on high-traffic endpoints.
Automated cloud data collection and reporting workflows, achieving 30% faster processing compared to previous manual flows.
Managed Docker-based deployments and CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions and Azure DevOps, ensuring consistent releases across staging and production.

en.title: Production Planning {{Intern}}
en.text: Optimized production scheduling and warehouse dispatch logistics using data-driven planning.
list: Optimized production scheduling and warehouse dispatch logistics using data-driven planning, achieving 30% faster delivery timelines compared to manual processes.
